title: Tama and the Alliance Shift the Battle
description: On pages 19–19, this part focuses on Unknown person #17 as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahhh!! everyone's turning back into an ice demon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This time the ice demons will be in as much danger as the rest of us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Do it! This is what I want!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These last few moments were like a gift from the heavens anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: If you let me live any longer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I leave the rest to you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I, HYogoro, the flower, no longer have any regrets!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With that, he entrusts his hopes and desires to his comrades!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 11 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
